message:
chore(wa-core): add dirs and chrono dependencies

Add dependencies for directory path utilities and timestamp handling:
- dirs 6.0.0: Cross-platform directory paths (home, config, data)
- chrono 0.4: Date/time handling with std and clock features

These support the new persistence layer that needs to locate
config directories and timestamp session data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,10 @@ rusqlite.workspace = true
 # Config
 toml.workspace = true
 
+# Directory paths
+dirs = "6.0.0"
+chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock"] }
+
 # File locking
 fs2.workspace = true
 base64 = "0.22.1"
